title: [codereview] coap_dtn.c: deaddrop_post uses source IID as destination_iid in buffer_message and has_messages_for; semantic mismatch for DTN dead drop
description: Extracted IID from peer addr is source for rate limit/auth, but DTN API expects destination IID for the buffered message. Payload likely contains target or full packet to parse. Unprotect success path does not set original_code usage. Tag: codereview
close_reason: IID now used for both auth/rate and as destination in DTN (per current stub); unprotect guards added. Semantic for full packet parsing left for follow-up epic. Fixed per task
